purpose: §18.3 + §18.4 aging guard. Tracks (a) HITL decisions and (b) non-gating audit signals over time. Nightly test_hitl_aging.py FAILS when any item has aged past its policy ceiling without an explicit re-review. Closes the Munger-flagged failure mode where 'REPORTED, NOT GATED' items sit indefinitely and become permanent furniture.

policy.rationale: 30 days = one normal sprint cycle; if HITL is not decided OR explicitly re-deferred within one cycle, the gate fires. 180 days = signals that flipped true and never resolved; quasi-permanent state forces escalation.
